productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones, 2ct - Isolated Donut Resin Pre-Rolled Cones - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Donut Resin flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
